title: Igesi Gas, a new era of convenience and flexibility
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Georgians often turn to...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Georgians often turn to Facebook to find the best service and prices for various products, and LPG gas frequently comes up in these discussions. With the opening of Igesi Gas in George, residents now have one less thing to worry about.

Igesi, derived from the Xhosa word for gas, is dedicated to bringing enhanced service and convenience to the community. They operate independently on the Afrox premises in Nelson Mandela Boulevard and have transformed the former corporate-only Afrox site into a flexible, customer-centric agency.


> This change allows them to uphold the high standards and quality products of Afrox while providing a more adaptable and responsive service model.


"One of our key advantages is accessibility. Whether you're a business with complex or simple gas requirements or merely an individual looking to refill or exchange a single Afrox Handigas cylinder, Igesi Gas is here for you, making it easy for everyone to access our services," says owner Chris Stander. "We also supply other retail outlets in the area that are always open on weekends for your convenience."

Safety and quality remain their top priorities, and by using Handigas, they ensure the Afrox red seal of safety, guaranteeing every LPG cylinder is 100% filled and 100% safe. This commitment to quality gives customers peace of mind, knowing they are receiving the best and safest product available.

Their transition to an independent agent means increased flexibility, extended trading hours and improved service delivery. Visit Igesi Gas in George today and experience the perfect blend of quality, safety and personalised service. "Whether for your business or home, we are here to meet all your gas needs with the reliability and excellence you expect from Afrox, now delivered with a local, personal touch," says Stander.

Trading hours:Monday to Thursday: 08:00 - 16:30Friday: 08:00 - 16:00Saturday (May to July, winter): 08:30 - 12:00

For more information, call us on 044 802 8800 or visit us at the Afrox premises at 95 Nelson Mandela Boulevard.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
